name: frontend-design-discipline
description: Frontend design direction and review skills for locking a high visual bar before build, then validating composition, brand, copy, and UI stability.

interface.shortDescription: Lock the visual bar before build, then review hard
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for high-bar frontend and Figma work. It first locks a strict design-direction packet, then uses preflight and critic reviews to prevent generic UI, weak art direction, and late-stage rescue work.
defaultPrompt: Use $frontend-design-director first to turn this brief into a strict build packet before any Figma or frontend work begins.
Use $frontend-preflight-critic as the first independent review on the proposed direction when delegation is available.
Use Frontend Design Discipline as a reviewer, not just a builder. Keep reviewer outputs free of tool-availability or process chatter.
After the build exists, run $review-refine-loop with the narrowest critic skill until the artifact passes the stated bar.
